topic: Amazon R6i Instance Type Family

  entities:

    Amazon R6i instances|Product
    Amazon Web Services|Company
    3rd-generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors|Product
    R5 instance types|Product

  proposition: [Amazon R6i instances are a family of instance types offered by Amazon Web Services.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    Amazon R6i instances|OFFERED_BY|Amazon Web Services

    entity-attributes:
    Amazon R6i instances|CATEGORY|family of instance types

  proposition: [Amazon R6i instances are powered by 3rd-generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    Amazon R6i instances|POWERED_BY|3rd-generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: [The 3rd-generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors used in Amazon R6i instances are code named Ice Lake.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    Amazon R6i instances|USES|3rd-generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors

    entity-attributes:
    3rd-generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors|CODE_NAME|Ice Lake

  proposition: [Amazon R6i instances are an ideal fit for memory-intensive workloads.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    Amazon R6i instances|USE_CASE|memory-intensive workloads

  proposition: [Amazon R6i instances offer up to 15% better compute price performance than comparable R5 instance types.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    Amazon R6i instances|COMPARED_TO|R5 instance types

    entity-attributes:
    Amazon R6i instances|COMPUTE_PRICE_PERFORMANCE|up to 15% better than R5 instance types

  proposition: [Amazon R6i instances offer up to 20% higher memory bandwidth per vCPU than comparable R5 instance types.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    Amazon R6i instances|COMPARED_TO|R5 instance types

    entity-attributes:
    Amazon R6i instances|MEMORY_BANDWIDTH_PER_VCPU|up to 20% higher than R5 instance types

  proposition: [The R5 instance types are a family of instance types offered by Amazon Web Services.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    R5 instance types|OFFERED_BY|Amazon Web Services

    entity-attributes:
    R5 instance types|CATEGORY|family of instance types
